nits: console.error on Composio API failure logged the full error message which can echo the request URL including the user_ids query param. → Fixed: now logs only `(status=NNN)` from the typed `status` field on the error, never the message body.

Resolver's ACTIVE-only check is stricter than shared isComposioConnectedAccountActive (which also accepts ENABLED/CONNECTED/missing). Plan specified ACTIVE so this matches spec; downstream B.6+ tools should pick one source of truth to avoid divergent visibility. Worth tracking as a follow-up.
Empty-string slug is filtered via JS truthy on `slug` rather than an explicit check — works but slightly implicit.
